title: Replace Drizzle .get() with .limit(1) in session layer files
consumer_purpose: Enable Postgres compatibility by removing SQLite-only .get() calls from session-layer Drizzle queries
claim_atoms: session.ts: 2 .get() calls replaced with .limit(1) using Pattern 1 (Effect context)
projectors.ts: 3 .get() calls replaced with .limit(1) using Pattern 3 (Sync context)
message-v2.ts: 2 .get() calls replaced with .limit(1).then() using Pattern 2 (Expression context)
prompt.ts: 2 .get() calls replaced with .limit(1).then() using Pattern 2 (Expression context)
All replacements verified via bun typecheck from packages/opencode
content:
# Lane 2 — Replace Drizzle .get() with .limit(1)

## Replacements by file

### 1. packages/opencode/src/session/session.ts (2 calls)
- **Line 584**: Effect context — replace `.get()` with `.limit(1)`, destructure with `const [row] =`
- **Line 658**: Effect context — replace `.get(),` with `.limit(1),`, destructure with `const [row] =`

### 2. packages/opencode/src/session/projectors.ts (3 calls)
- **Line 117**: Sync context (returning chain) — replace `.get()` with `.limit(1)`, destructure with `const [row] =`
- **Line 164**: Sync context — replace `.get()` with `.limit(1)`, destructure with `const [row] =`
- **Line 175**: Sync context (inline) — replace `.get()` with `.limit(1)`, destructure with `const [row] =`

### 3. packages/opencode/src/session/message-v2.ts (2 calls)
- **Line 943**: Database.use callback — replace `.get(),` with `.limit(1).then(rows => rows[0]),`
- **Line 1005**: Database.use callback — replace `.get(),` with `.limit(1).then(rows => rows[0]),`

### 4. packages/opencode/src/session/prompt.ts (2 calls)
- **Line 677**: Database.use callback — replace `.get(),` with `.limit(1).then(rows => rows[0]),`
- **Line 709**: Database.use callback — replace `.get(),` with `.limit(1).then(rows => rows[0]),`

## Verification
Run `bun typecheck` from packages/opencode to confirm no type errors remain.
